_schema.route: URL pattern using [param] notation for path segments

pathParams.<name>: description OR { description, values[] } when the param has a fixed set of allowed values

values: exhaustive list of known values, if applicable

routes.description: Public landing page. Displays an error banner when auth errors are forwarded back from the OAuth provider.

errorcode.description: OAuth/auth error code — dialog only renders if this is present

original_code.description: Raw original error code from the auth provider, carried for debugging

description.description: Human-readable error description; only meaningful when errorcode is also set

routes.description: Public gallery page.
Public notebooks listing page.
SfN 2025 conference landing page.
Individual news article page fetched from Sanity CMS.

pathParams.slug: URL-friendly identifier of the news article in Sanity CMS

routes.description: Dynamic top-level CMS-driven page (e.g. /about, /team) rendered from a Sanity section.

pathParams.sanitySectionSlug: Slug of the Sanity CMS section to render

routes.description: Login page. Redirects to callbackUrl after successful authentication.

callbackUrl.description: URL to redirect the user to after successful login

routes.description: Logs the user out and clears the session.
Callback page shown after the offline token consent flow completes. Notifies the parent window of success or failure then auto-closes.

error.description: Error code returned by the offline token consent flow; absence means success

description.description: Human-readable description of the consent error

session_state_id.description: Session identifier used to notify the parent window of the consent outcome via a broadcast event

routes.description: Processes a virtual lab or project invitation using a one-time token.

token.description: One-time invite token used to look up and accept the lab/project invitation

routes.description: Generic entity detail page — resolves the entity type and redirects to the appropriate typed detail view.
Entity shortcut page with virtual lab and project context — resolves the entity type and redirects to the typed detail view under the correct project.
Workspace resolution page. Checks the user's virtual lab and project state and redirects accordingly; shows a setup wizard if neither exists yet.

redirectUrl.description: Destination to forward the user to after workspace resolution completes

routes.description: Shown when the user attempts to access a virtual lab they are not a member of.
Virtual lab project home page showing overview and activity.

pathParams.projectId: UUID of the project within the virtual lab

routes.description: Team management page for the project — lists members and roles.
Credit usage and billing information for the project.
In-app help center with tabbed sections: Overview, Tutorials, Glossary, Guides, Features, Pricing, AI Chat Tools, and About.

section.description: Active top-level tab in the help center

subsection.description: Active sub-section within the About or Guides tab

scale.description: Active scale filter in the Features tab

tool.description: ID of the active AI chat tool shown in the AI Chat Tools tab

tutorial.description: Slug of the active tutorial shown in the Tutorials tab

term.description: Glossary term slug currently highlighted in the Glossary tab

routes.description: Data section landing page for the project. Shows entity type tiles grouped by category (Experimental, Models, Simulations) with a brain region tree sidebar for filtering.

group.description: Which category tab is active on the data landing page

scope.description: Whether to show counts for publicly available entities or project-private ones

br_id.description: ID of the selected brain region in the hierarchy tree; persisted to localStorage and restored on revisit

br_av.description: Annotation value of the selected brain region; always paired with br_id

routes.description: Browse and filter a specific entity type (e.g. cell morphologies, ME-models) within the project data.

scope.description: Whether to list publicly available entities or only those belonging to this project

group.description: Category group the entity belongs to — carried in the URL so breadcrumb navigation back to the data landing page preserves the active tab

br_id.description: ID of the selected brain region used to filter the entity listing

br_av.description: Annotation value of the selected brain region; always paired with br_id

routes.description: Browse circuit entities — separate route because circuits have a distinct UI from other entity types.
Detail view for a specific data entity, with tabbed sections. Available sections depend on the entity type.

section.description: Active tab/section within the detail view. Not all sections are available for every entity type — overview is always available.

routes.description: Jupyter notebooks listing, scoped to either public notebooks or project-private ones.
Reports section. Switches between sub-pages (OBI showcases, showcases, summaries) via a search param.
OBI showcase listing — redirects back to the main reports page.
Detail page for a single OBI showcase project fetched from Sanity CMS.

pathParams.slug: Sanity CMS slug of the OBI showcase project

section.description: Which content section of the showcase to display

routes.description: Workflows section landing page listing all build, simulate, and extract workflows for the project. The top selector picks a category, then a type; the activity table below shows workflow history.

activity.description: Active workflow category in the top selector

type.description: Active entity type in the top selector (snake_case, e.g. memodel, single_neuron_synaptome)

tactivity.description: Activity filter for the workflow history table

ttype.description: Entity type filter for the workflow history table (snake_case)

scope.description: Whether to show public or project-private workflows

routes.description: Entity picker for starting a new build workflow — browse and select an existing model as the starting point.

type.description: Type of model being built in kebab-case

scope.description: Whether to browse public or project-private entities when picking a starting model

routes.description: ME-model build configuration wizard — step through morphology selection, e-model selection, and validation.

sessionId.description: Unique ID scoping all build state for this session; auto-generated if absent

step.description: Active step in the ME-model build wizard

routes.description: Single-neuron synaptome build configuration wizard — configure synapse placement on an ME-model.

sessionId.description: Unique ID scoping all build state for this session; auto-generated if absent

step.description: Active step in the synaptome build wizard

set.description: ID of the currently selected synapse set shown in the configuration panel

routes.description: Ion channel modeling campaign build configuration page — configure parameters for building ion channel models.

sessionId.description: Unique ID scoping build state for this session; auto-generated if absent

original-campaign-id.description: UUID of an existing ion channel modeling campaign to clone/edit its configuration

readonly.description: Set to 'true' to open the configuration in read-only mode

routes.description: Entity picker for starting a new simulation workflow — browse and select a model to simulate.

ME-model simulation configuration and execution page with a 3D neuron visualizer and multi-step setup. When dataType is set to memodel_circuit, switches to scan-config mode for circuit-level simulation.

pathParams.id: UUID of the ME-model entity to simulate

sessionId.description: Unique ID scoping all simulation state for this run; auto-generated if absent

step.description: Active step in the simulation setup wizard (e.g. info, experimental-setup)

panel.description: Which output panel is currently visible

3d.description: Display state of the 3D neuron visualizer

dataType.description: Overrides entity type to switch into scan-config mode for memodel circuits

initialCampaignId.description: UUID of an existing simulation campaign to pre-populate the configuration form

record.description: Which simulation recording to display in the results panel

routes.description: Single-neuron synaptome simulation configuration and execution page with a 3D neuron visualizer.

pathParams.id: UUID of the synaptome entity to simulate

sessionId.description: Unique ID scoping all simulation state for this run; auto-generated if absent

step.description: Active step in the synaptome simulation wizard

3d.description: Display state of the 3D neuron visualizer

record.description: Which simulation recording to display in the results panel

routes.description: Circuit simulation configuration page using a scan-config form.

pathParams.id: UUID of the circuit entity to simulate

sessionId.description: Unique ID scoping simulation state for this run

step.description: Active step in the circuit simulation wizard

initialCampaignId.description: UUID of an existing simulation campaign to pre-populate the configuration form

routes.description: Ion channel model simulation configuration page using a scan-config form. Unlike other simulate/configure routes, this one has no [id] path param — the campaign is loaded via initialCampaignId.

sessionId.description: Unique ID scoping simulation state for this run

step.description: Active step in the simulation wizard

initialCampaignId.description: UUID of an existing simulation campaign to pre-populate the configuration form

routes.description: Workflow result viewer — immediately redirects to the same URL with /overview appended, preserving all existing search params.

pathParams.id: UUID of the workflow result entity

routes.description: Workflow result detail viewer with a specific section/tab active.

pathParams.id: UUID of the workflow result entity

section.description: Active tab within the result viewer. Not all sections are available for every entity type.

routes.description: Entity picker for starting a new extraction workflow — browse and select a model to extract data from.

type.description: Type of model to extract from in kebab-case

routes.description: Circuit extraction configuration page — configure parameters for extracting data from a circuit model using a scan-config form.

pathParams.id: UUID of the circuit entity to extract from

sessionId.description: Unique ID scoping extraction state for this session

step.description: Active step in the extraction workflow wizard

initialCampaignId.description: UUID of an existing extraction campaign to pre-populate the configuration form
